title: Location Evidence
description: Canonical geographic measurement, stored independently of any later map projection or rendering. Central rule: coordinates are measured evidence; a map projection is an interpretation of that evidence (see schemas/projection-accountability.schema.json). Extends, and does not replace, the simpler `location` object on schemas/observation.schema.json — this schema is the full evidentiary record; observation.location remains a lightweight summary. First draft, not yet reviewed by Kemi. Does not claim centimeter accuracy as a default: horizontal_accuracy_m and vertical_accuracy_m depend on receiver quality, antenna placement, environment, corrections, and processing conditions.

coordinate_reference_system.description: e.g. EPSG:4326. Required whenever latitude/longitude are present so downstream consumers never assume a default CRS.

raw_observation_file.description: Reference to a raw GNSS observation file where the receiver and storage support it. Optional; most MVP hardware configurations will not populate this field — see docs/mvp/hardware/instrumentation-revision-v0.02.md.
